L-ACCEPT.description: Leaf has ALL needed interfaces (get/list/exists/create) → should generate code

L-NO-CREATE.description: Leaf needs to create product but only has read interfaces → INSUFFICIENT_CAPABILITIES

L-NO-READ.description: Leaf needs to read product price but only has write interfaces → INSUFFICIENT_CAPABILITIES

L-NO-ACCESS.description: Leaf needs to delete product but only has read interfaces → INSUFFICIENT_CAPABILITIES

S-SHORT.description: generate_with_retry on INSUFFICIENT_CAPABILITIES → exacty 1 API call (short-circuit)

results.description: Leaf has ALL needed interfaces (get/list/exists/create) → should generate code
Leaf needs to create product but only has read interfaces → INSUFFICIENT_CAPABILITIES

composition_feedback.suggested_fix: Add a create_product(product_data: dict) -> dict interface to the InterfacePlan that creates a new product and returns it with an assigned ID.

missing_interfaces.why_needed: The function needs to create a new product record, but no granted interface provides write/create capability. Only read and existence check interfaces are available.

results.description: Leaf needs to read product price but only has write interfaces → INSUFFICIENT_CAPABILITIES

composition_feedback.suggested_fix: Add a read interface such as get_product(product_id: str) -> dict to the InterfacePlan.

missing_interfaces.why_needed: The function needs to retrieve a product by ID to get its price, but no read/get interface is granted. Only create and update interfaces are provided.

results.description: Leaf needs to delete product but only has read interfaces → INSUFFICIENT_CAPABILITIES

composition_feedback.suggested_fix: Add a delete_product(product_id: str) -> bool interface to the InterfacePlan.

missing_interfaces.why_needed: The function needs to delete a product from the catalog, but no granted interface provides a delete operation.
